creator: tobik@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Tobias Kortkamp from comment #7)
It fails to build with

edi_consolepanel.c:275:54: error: unknown type name 'Eo_Event'; did you mean 'Efl_Event'?
_edi_testpanel_line_cb(void *data EINA_UNUSED, const Eo_Event *event)
                                                     ^~~~~~~~
                                                     Efl_Event
/usr/local/include/eo-1/efl_object.eo.h:36:3: note: 'Efl_Event' declared here
} Efl_Event;

Full build log: https://pkg.tobik.me/logs/edi-0.4.0.log
